zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice St Philibert於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親John St Philibert39歲，母親Ada Botetourt37歲。她於1340年與Stephen Waleys結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1383年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice St Philibert于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲John St Philibert39岁，母亲Ada Botetourt37岁。她于1340年与Stephen Waleys结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1383年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Philibert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand, Mirielle, Pascale, Pierrot.

French: from the personal name Philibert, from ancient Germanic Filuberht, composed of the elements fila ‘much, very’ + berht ‘bright’, which was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, abbot of Jumièges. The spelling has been influenced by personal names of Greek origin based on philein ‘to love’, e.g. Philip .

variants.name: Philbert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique.  German Kurt.
French and German (Bavaria): from the personal name Philbert, from ancient Germanic Filuberht (see Philibert ).

variants.name: Philip
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Varughese, Mathai, Babu, Reji, Anil, Binu, Neena, Prema, Raju, Reena, Susheela, Aleykutty.

Scottish, English, German, Dutch, and Jewish: from the Greek personal name Philippos (from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’). In the New Testament this name is borne by one of the apostles; it was also borne by various other early Christian saints. It owes part of its popularity to the medieval romances about Alexander the Great, whose father was Philip of Macedon. As a Jewish name, it represents a borrowing of the personal name from Christians. As a Highland Scottish surname, it represents an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhilib ‘son of Philip’. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Spanish Felipe , Catalan Felip, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or Croatian Filip , Albanian Filipi , and their derivatives (see examples at Philips ). The name Philip is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Philipose and Pothen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Phillip .
French (southern) and Breton (Finistère): variant of   Philippe  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice St Philibert was born about 1330, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John St Philibert, was 39 and her mother, Ada Botetourt, was 37. She married Stephen Waleys in 1340. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1383, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice St Philibert est née environ 1330, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John St Philibert, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ada Botetourt, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Waleys en 1340. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1383, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice St Philibert um 1330 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John St Philibert 39 und ihre Mutter Ada Botetourt 37. Sie hat 1340 Stephen Waleys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1383 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice St Philibert è nata il circa 1330 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John St Philibert, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ada Botetourt, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Waleys nel 1340. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1383, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice St Philibert(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John St Philibert(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada Botetourt(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1340년 Stephen Waleys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1383년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice St Philibert nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John St Philibert, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ada Botetourt, tinha 37 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice St Philibert родилась около 1330 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John St Philibert было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Botetourt, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Waleys в 1340 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1383 г. в возрасте 55 лет.
